source.description: Six-panel pencil process contact sheet generated in Codex image generation and saved under drafts/garden-gnome before cropping.
source.notes: Promoted from a previously generated alternate sheet after owner requested these unused image tutorials be backfilled.

process_strategy: The same centered gnome pose builds from hat and body guides into beard, feet, hands, garden texture, restrained color, and final line confidence.

final_elements.name: pointed gnome hat
final_elements.description: A tall leaning pointed hat that gives the gnome its main silhouette.

final_elements.name: rounded body guide
final_elements.description: A small rounded body mass underneath the hat that anchors the character.

final_elements.name: round nose
final_elements.description: A simple oval nose tucked under the hat brim.

final_elements.name: large beard shape
final_elements.description: A broad tapered beard that fills the center of the gnome.

final_elements.name: small boots
final_elements.description: Two rounded boots that support the little standing pose.

final_elements.name: side hands
final_elements.description: Small mitten-like hands placed against both sides of the beard.

final_elements.name: garden ground texture
final_elements.description: Grass tufts and ground marks that place the gnome in a garden.

final_elements.name: restrained red and blue color
final_elements.description: Colored-pencil red hat and blue coat accents applied to existing shapes.

frames.visible_job: Places the tall pointed hat guide, a rounded body guide, and a center line for the gnome.
Adds the hat brim, round nose, and large tapered beard inside the existing body guide.
Clarifies the coat sides and places the two small boots beneath the beard.
Strengthens the brim area and adds mitten-like side hands and sleeves around the beard.
Adds beard texture, garden ground marks, and restrained colored-pencil fills to existing shapes.

final_step.visible_job: Only deepens keeper contours, beard texture, color, and ground shadows already established in the process frames.

rejection_checks: No major contour, prop, marking, or color choice should first appear in the final image.
No frame may darken, ink, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
